caption: In a large, brightly lit hall with a blue carpeted floor and ornate ceiling chandeliers, several men practice coordinated martial arts movements. One man in the center wears a blue tunic and pants, while others wear traditional white or black uniforms. In the initial sequence, the group stands in a wide stance with arms extended in a rhythmic, striking motion. As the scene progresses, they transition their posture, shifting their weight and lowering their center of gravity into a deeper crouch. The man in blue leads the movement, moving his arms downward and stepping forward, while the others follow in synchronization. In the background, a crowd of spectators sits at tables, watching the demonstration. There is no on-screen text or logos visible. The sequence captures a fluid transition from an upright striking pose to a lower, balanced defensive position.
